# JavaScript / TypeScript dangerous sinks — category TAB regex
PROTOTYPE_POLLUTION	\b(_\.merge|_\.defaultsDeep|_\.mergeWith|jQuery\.extend\s*\(\s*true|\$\.extend\s*\(\s*true)
PROTOTYPE_POLLUTION	\bObject\.assign\s*\(\s*\{\s*\}\s*,\s*\.\.\.
PROTOTYPE_POLLUTION	\[['"]__proto__['"]\]
PROTOTYPE_POLLUTION	\[['"]constructor['"]\]\s*\[['"]prototype['"]\]
CODE_EVAL	\beval\s*\(
CODE_EVAL	\bnew\s+Function\s*\(
CODE_EVAL	\b(setTimeout|setInterval)\s*\(\s*['"`]
CODE_EVAL	\bvm\.(runInContext|runInNewContext|runInThisContext|compileFunction)\s*\(
TEMPLATE_INJECT	\bhandlebars\.compile\s*\(
TEMPLATE_INJECT	\bejs\.(render|compile)\s*\(
TEMPLATE_INJECT	\bpug\.(compile|render)\s*\(
COMMAND_EXEC	\bchild_process\.(exec|execSync|spawn|spawnSync)\s*\(
COMMAND_EXEC	\bexec(Sync)?\s*\(
COMMAND_EXEC	\bshelljs\.exec\s*\(
COMMAND_EXEC	\{\s*shell\s*:\s*true\s*\}
PATH_TRAVERSAL	\bfs\.(readFile|readFileSync|createReadStream|open|openSync|stat|statSync)\s*\(
PATH_TRAVERSAL	\bres\.(sendFile|download)\s*\(
PATH_TRAVERSAL	\bpath\.join\s*\([^)]*(req\.|user|input)
ZIP_SLIP	\btar\.(x|extract|extractAll)\s*\(
ZIP_SLIP	\bAdmZip\.extractAllTo\s*\(
ZIP_SLIP	\bdecompress\s*\(
SSRF	\b(fetch|axios|got|request|needle)\s*\(\s*(req\.|user|input)
SSRF	\bhttp\.(get|request)\s*\(\s*(req\.|user)
SSRF	\burl\.parse\s*\(
XSS_RAW	\.innerHTML\s*=
XSS_RAW	\.outerHTML\s*=
XSS_RAW	\bdocument\.write\s*\(
XSS_RAW	\binsertAdjacentHTML\s*\(
XSS_RAW	dangerouslySetInnerHTML
XSS_RAW	\bbypassSecurityTrust(Html|Script|Url|ResourceUrl|Style)\s*\(
SQL_INJECTION	\.\s*query\s*\(\s*[`'"][^`'"]*(\$\{|'\s*\+)
SQL_INJECTION	\.\s*(raw|whereRaw|havingRaw|orderByRaw)\s*\(
NOSQL_INJECTION	\$where\s*:\s*(req\.|user)
NOSQL_INJECTION	\.find\s*\(\s*req\.(body|query|params)
REDOS	\bnew\s+RegExp\s*\(\s*(req\.|user|input)
OPEN_REDIRECT	\bres\.redirect\s*\(\s*(req\.|user|input)
OPEN_REDIRECT	\bwindow\.location\s*=
WEAK_JWT	\bjwt\.verify\s*\([^)]*algorithms\s*:\s*\[?['"]none
WEAK_JWT	\bjwt\.decode\s*\([^)]*complete\s*:\s*false
WEAK_JWT	\bjwt\.verify\s*\([^)]*\)(?![^)]*algorithms)
DYNAMIC_REQUIRE	\brequire\s*\(\s*(req\.|user|input)
DYNAMIC_REQUIRE	\bimport\s*\(\s*(req\.|user|input)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# v3.1 — Semantic-flag sinks (functions to review + framework footguns).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
SANITIZER_REVIEW	\b(function|async\s+function|const|let|var)\s+_?(strip|sanitize|escape|filter|clean|remove|scrub|redact|mask|normalize|canonicalize)[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*\s*(\(|\s*=\s*(async\s*)?\()
SANITIZER_REVIEW	\b(function|const|let|var)\s+_?(isSafe|safe|allow|authorize|checkAccess|ensure|enforce|validate|verify)[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*\s*(\(|\s*=\s*(async\s*)?\()
BROWSER_API_FOOTGUN	\burlFilter\s*:\s*[^,}\n]*\+
BROWSER_API_FOOTGUN	\burlFilter\s*:\s*[`'"][^`'"]*[^*|]$
BROWSER_API_FOOTGUN	\bdeclarativeNetRequest\b
BROWSER_API_FOOTGUN	\boptional_host_permissions\b
BROWSER_API_FOOTGUN	\bchrome\.(webRequest|cookies|identity)\b
BROWSER_API_FOOTGUN	\bhost_permissions.*\*\s*:
BROWSER_API_FOOTGUN	\b(onHeadersReceived|onBeforeSendHeaders|onAuthRequired)\b
FRAMEWORK_FOOTGUN	\bexec\s*\(\s*[`'"][^`'"]*\$\{[^}]*(req\.|request\.|user|input|params|query|body)
FRAMEWORK_FOOTGUN	\bexec\s*\(\s*`[^`]*\$\{
FRAMEWORK_FOOTGUN	\bres\.sendFile\s*\([^)]*(req\.|user|input|params)
FRAMEWORK_FOOTGUN	\bsafeWindow\b
FRAMEWORK_FOOTGUN	\btrustedTypes\.createPolicy
FRAMEWORK_FOOTGUN	\b(loadDataWithBaseURL|loadUrl|loadData)\s*\(
FRAMEWORK_FOOTGUN	\baddJavascriptInterface\s*\(
FRAMEWORK_FOOTGUN	\bFLAG_GRANT_(READ|WRITE)_URI_PERMISSION
